chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2828 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application --------------------------------------------- 28.01.2026 Mr. Abdul Khalique Jokhio, advocate for applicant Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. ------------------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicants/accused does not press the instant criminal bail application on the ground that the applicants/accused have been acquitted of the charge by the learned trial Court vide judgment dated 20.01.2026. In support of his contention, learned counsel has placed on record case diary dated 20.01.2026. In view of such position, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
